steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The crucial phrase is “a title that _____.” A UNESCO title is a marker of recognition. The blank needs a verb describing how a title indicates something true about Chengdu.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content:
Denotes means to indicate or represent. In “a title that denotes that Chengdu has a unique and vibrant food culture,” the word conveys how the UNESCO recognition signals something true about the city.

The other three don't work: renounces contradicts the supportive context, discovers doesn't describe what titles do, and complains is semantically impossible.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
